results.description: OpenSSL hashes cached 1 GiB file with SHA-256
results.setup: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; p = Path('/tmp/vm-host-perf-work/hash-1g.bin'); p.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True); size = 1024 * 1024 * 1024; chunk = bytes((i % 251 for i in range(1024 * 1024))); (not p.exists() or p.stat().st_size != size) and p.write_bytes(chunk * 1024)"

results.description: Python allocate and touch 512 MiB bytearray
